description_long: This is a medium-sized plastic bottle with a blue screw cap and a cylindrical body that tapers slightly toward the neck. The bottle's main body is a reddish-brown color, suggesting it may contain a powdered or granular substance, possibly a food or drink mix. The front features a partially legible label with bold white and red text, and a prominent '50X' marking, along with some blue and white graphics. The back side displays a more detailed label, likely containing nutritional or product information, but the text is blurred and unreadable. The bottle's surface appears matte with some subtle texture, and there are no visible signs of damage or deformation. The cap is solid blue and contrasts with the rest of the bottle, indicating a typical screw-on closure.
description: A reddish-brown plastic bottle with a blue screw cap and bold front labeling, likely containing a powdered or granular product. The bottle has a matte finish and clear branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with bold text, '50X' marking, and blue graphics, as well as the blue screw cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's cylindrical shape, slight tapering, and the solid blue cap, with minimal label visibility.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a large, mostly blue and white label with blurred text, and the blue cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's shape and cap, with no visible labeling.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with bold white and red text, '50X' marking, and blue graphics; back label with blue and white text, both labels are partially blurred.
